page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.mn4.xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor with an x86_64 architecture, providing 4 vCPUs and 4 physical cores running at a clock speed of 2.5 GHz. The instance is configured with a shared CPU allocation and includes 16.0 GB of system memory, yielding 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, and it operates with a baseline network bandwidth of 1 Gbps.

Benchmark evaluations indicate that the ecs.mn4.xlarge delivers modest performance across most workloads. Single-core and multi-core CPU performance in stress-ng and Geekbench tests falls into the bottom 25% tier. Similarly, memory bandwidth for read operations is weak, though write bandwidth for large blocks reaches average levels. Cryptographic and compression tasks, such as single-threaded gzip and bzip3 decompression, show poor performance, placing in the bottom 10%. However, the processor maintains average performance in Passmark CPU extended instruction tests, utilizing its AVX and AVX-512 instruction sets.

Given its shared CPU allocation and entry-level performance profile, this instance offers a cost-effective option for resource-dense environments where continuous peak CPU utilization is not required. It is best suited for general-purpose workloads, including light web serving, basic database operations, development or testing environments, and low-throughput background tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.mn4.xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine featuring 4 vCPUs and 16.0 GB of RAM, running on an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor at 2.5 GHz. Utilizing a shared CPU allocation under the KVM hypervisor, this instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 1 Gbps. Benchmark data indicates modest performance, with single-core and multi-core CPU capabilities generally placing in the bottom 25%, alongside weak read memory bandwidth. However, it maintains average performance in large-block memory write operations and extended CPU instructions. This hardware profile represents a cost-efficient option for non-intensive workloads, making it suitable for light web serving, development environments, and basic application hosting.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.mn4.xlarge is a general-purpose instance with 4 vCPUs, 16 GB RAM, and an Intel Xeon processor. It offers cost-effective, entry-level performance for light web serving and development workloads.

tagline: A budget-friendly general-purpose virtual server with balanced memory and shared CPU resources for non-intensive application hosting and development.
